reviews.comment:
El lugar es tranquilo la gente respeta al vecino . El personal es cordial y amable . Los baños impecables. Hace años que concurro a este Aca   . Siempre el vecino de turno te saluda cuando se retira .

(Translated by Google)
The place is quiet and people respect their neighbors. The staff is friendly and kind. The bathrooms are spotless. I've been coming to this Aca for years. The neighbor on duty always says goodbye when they leave.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzcXV5UUJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Lindo el lugar mucha sombra , se puede hacer asado,  y el precio es accesible a quienes no son socios. Lo único incómodo es que los baños están clausurados , por el momento, de igual forma se pueden utilizar los de YPF, que está en la entrada. 👍

(Translated by Google)
The place is lovely, with plenty of shade. You can have a barbecue, and the price is affordable for non-members. The only downside is that the restrooms are currently closed, but you can use the ones at the YPF gas station near the entrance. 👍
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzNHJESkhBEAE
